## Checklist
- [ ] I ran `make test` (or `pytest -q`) and all tests pass locally.
- [ ] I ran `make lint` (ruff + next lint) and there are no new warnings.
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs in `/docs` or `README.md`.
- [ ] I updated or added fixtures / tests where appropriate.
